heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly to partly cloudy. Highs from the mid 50s to around 60; some lower 50s northeast and in the Adirondacks. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy early, then clouds increasing from the west. Lows from the mid 30s to around 40, northeastern cold hollows in the lower 30s. Winds becoming light east of the Green Mountains, becoming south 5 to 10 mph from the Green Mountains westward.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly cloudy. Morning showers developing from the Greens Mountains westward, spreading east of the Greens in the afternoon. Highs from the mid 50s to around 60, except low to mid 50s northeast. South winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph west of the Greens.
